source: Curated complaint-category playbook for the Consumer Protection Act, 2019. Reliefs and section references are guidance, not legal advice.
disclaimer: Always confirm applicable sections and reliefs with a qualified advocate before filing. The relief language below is a starting point.

categories.label: Defective goods (manufacturing defect, damaged product, wrong item delivered)
typical_reliefs: Direct the Opposite Party to refund the full purchase price paid by the Complainant, together with interest thereon at the rate of 9% per annum from the date of payment till realisation
Direct the Opposite Party to replace the defective product with a brand-new defect-free product of the same description, make, and specifications, at no additional cost to the Complainant
Direct the Opposite Party to pay compensation for mental agony, harassment, and incidental expenses suffered by the Complainant on account of the deficient conduct of the Opposite Party
Direct the Opposite Party to pay the costs of this complaint as assessed by this Hon'ble Commission
evidence_checklist: Invoice / receipt of purchase (Annexure-A)
Photographs / video of the defect (Annexure-B)
Warranty card (Annexure-C)
Communication with seller / manufacturer — emails, chats, complaint tickets (Annexure-D)
Independent expert / technician report identifying the defect (Annexure-E, if available)

categories.label: Deficient service (telecom, banking, insurance, courier, e-commerce platform)
typical_reliefs: Direct the Opposite Party to render the service contracted and paid for, within a time stipulated by this Hon'ble Commission, failing which to refund the fees / charges paid
Direct the Opposite Party to refund the fees, charges, and any wrongful deductions made, together with interest thereon at the rate of 9% per annum from the date of payment till realisation
Direct the Opposite Party to pay compensation for loss caused by the deficiency in service and for mental agony, harassment, and inconvenience suffered
Direct the Opposite Party to pay the costs of this complaint as assessed by this Hon'ble Commission
evidence_checklist: Service contract / subscription agreement / terms and conditions (Annexure-A)
Bills / payment receipts / bank statements showing charges paid (Annexure-B)
Complaint tickets / grievance reference numbers (Annexure-C)
All correspondence with the service provider — emails, chat transcripts, letters (Annexure-D)
Bank / account statements showing wrongful charges or deductions (Annexure-E)

categories.label: Unfair / misleading trade practice (false promises, hidden charges, misleading ads)
typical_reliefs: Direct the Opposite Party to immediately discontinue the unfair trade practice complained of and to restrain from adopting similar practices in future
Direct the Opposite Party to refund the price paid by the Complainant as a result of the misrepresentation / unfair trade practice, together with interest thereon at 9% per annum
Direct the Opposite Party to issue corrective advertisements in the same medium and with the same prominence as the offending advertisement, at the Opposite Party's own cost
Direct the Opposite Party to pay compensation for loss and mental agony suffered
Direct the Opposite Party to pay the costs of this complaint as assessed by this Hon'ble Commission
evidence_checklist: Copy of the misleading advertisement / brochure / website screenshot with timestamp (Annexure-A)
Invoice showing price paid (Annexure-B)
Comparison document showing what was promised vs. what was delivered (Annexure-C)
Witness statements, if any (Annexure-D)

categories.label: Medical negligence (consumer service deficiency by hospitals / clinics)
typical_reliefs: Direct the Opposite Party to pay compensation for the medical expenses incurred by the Complainant as a direct result of the negligent treatment / deficiency in service
Direct the Opposite Party to pay compensation for the pain, suffering, permanent disability (if any), and loss of future earnings suffered by the Complainant
Direct the Opposite Party to pay compensation for mental agony and trauma caused to the Complainant and the Complainant's family
Direct the Opposite Party to pay the costs of this complaint as assessed by this Hon'ble Commission
evidence_checklist: Complete medical records — admission file, case history, discharge summary, prescriptions (Annexure-A)
Hospital bills and payment receipts (Annexure-B)
Second medical opinion / expert report identifying the deficiency or negligence (Annexure-C)
Chronological treatment timeline prepared by the Complainant (Annexure-D)

categories.label: Real estate / builder dispute (delayed possession, deviation from sanctioned plan)
typical_reliefs: Direct the Opposite Party / builder to hand over physical possession of the said unit / property forthwith and to pay delay compensation at the rate stipulated in the builder-buyer agreement (or at such rate as this Hon'ble Commission may determine) for the entire period of delay

In the alternative, direct the Opposite Party to refund the entire amount paid by the Complainant together with interest thereon at the rate of 9% per annum from the respective dates of payment till actual realisation
Direct the Opposite Party to pay compensation for rent paid by the Complainant during the period of delay
Direct the Opposite Party to pay compensation for mental agony, hardship, and incidental expenses
Direct the Opposite Party to pay the costs of this complaint as assessed by this Hon'ble Commission
evidence_checklist: Builder-buyer agreement / allotment letter (Annexure-A)
All payment receipts and bank statements evidencing payments made (Annexure-B)
Sanctioned plan vs. as-built plan comparison showing deviations, if any (Annexure-C)
All correspondence with the builder including possession letters and demand notices (Annexure-D)
RERA registration details and RERA complaint number, if applicable (Annexure-E)

categories.label: E-commerce / online marketplace dispute
typical_reliefs: Direct the Opposite Party / platform to refund the price paid by the Complainant, together with interest thereon at 9% per annum from the date of payment till realisation
In the alternative, direct the Opposite Party to replace the defective / wrong item with the correct product as described and advertised at the time of purchase, at no additional cost
Direct the Opposite Party to pay compensation for incidental expenses including return shipping costs, loss of work time, and out-of-pocket expenses incurred in pursuing the grievance
Direct the Opposite Party / platform to comply with its published return and refund policy and to restrain from unfair trade practices in future
Direct the Opposite Party to pay the costs of this complaint as assessed by this Hon'ble Commission
evidence_checklist: Order confirmation page / email / app screenshot with order ID (Annexure-A)
Screenshot of the product listing as it appeared at the time of purchase, with description and specifications (Annexure-B)
All chat / email communications with platform support and the seller (Annexure-C)
Photographs of the received goods showing defect / discrepancy (Annexure-D)
Bank / UPI / wallet statement showing payment (Annexure-E)
